name: GLADSTONE LAND Corp
business: GLADSTONE LAND Corp is an externally-managed agricultural REIT that primarily owns and leases farmland, including through lease structures with a variable rent component based on gross revenues. It owns 144 farms totaling 98,688 acres across 14 U.S. states and 55,532 acre-feet of water assets in California. The company leases farmland to independent and corporate farming operations on a triple-net lease basis.

exposures.sentence: We are an externally-managed, agricultural real estate investment trust ( REIT ) that is primarily in the business of owning and leasing farmland, including through lease structures with a variable rent component based on the gross revenues generated from certain farms in lieu of fixed base rent.
